user.title: Connect to OBI Energy
user.description: Enter the email address and password you use for the heyOBI app. Your credentials are stored securely in Home Assistant's config entry storage, never in YAML, and are only used to obtain a session token. After setup, you can use "Configure" on the integration to adjust the scan interval and historical data duration.

select_bridge.title: Select bridge and sensor
select_bridge.description: Multiple OBI bridges/sensors were found on your account. Choose the one to monitor.

manual.title: Enter bridge and sensor IDs manually
manual.description: The bridge list could not be retrieved automatically. Enter the household ID (HH_ID) and sensor ID (MID_ID) manually.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with OBI
reauth_confirm.description: The stored OBI password for {email} no longer works. Enter the current password to continue.

reconfigure_confirm.title: Update OBI credentials
reconfigure_confirm.description: Update the OBI email and/or password used by this integration.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your OBI email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the OBI servers. Please try again later.
error.invalid_ids: No data could be found for the entered household/sensor ID.

abort.reconfigure_successful: The OBI credentials were updated successfully.

init.title: OBI Energy options
init.description: Configure how often data is fetched and refreshed. Keep the historical data duration small (e.g. PT15M) - larger windows (like PT6H) have been observed to make OBI's API return older data instead of the latest reading.
